parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'common', method: 'authenticate', args: [$env.ODOO_DB, $env.ODOO_USERNAME, $env.ODOO_API_KEY, {}] }, id: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $env.ODOO_DB, $('Odoo Authenticate').item.json.result, $env.ODOO_API_KEY, 'res.partner', 'search_read', [[['email', '=', $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.customer_email]]], { fields: ['id', 'name', 'email'], limit: 1 } ] }, id: 2 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $env.ODOO_DB, $('Odoo Authenticate').item.json.result, $env.ODOO_API_KEY, 'crm.lead', 'create', [{ name: '[Zammad #' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.ticket_number + '] ' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.title, contact_name: $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.customer_name, email_from: $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.customer_email, partner_id: ($json.result && $json.result.length > 0) ? $json.result[0].id : false, description: 'Support ticket from Zammad

Ticket: #' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.ticket_number + '
Priority: ' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.priority + '
Group: ' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.group + '

View: ' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.zammad_url, type: 'opportunity' }], { context: { mail_create_nosubscribe: true, mail_create_nolog: true, mail_notrack: true, tracking_disable: true } } ] }, id: 3 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $env.ODOO_DB, $('Odoo Authenticate').item.json.result, $env.ODOO_API_KEY, 'crm.lead', 'message_post', [$json.result], { body: '

🎫 Zammad Ticket #' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.ticket_number + '

' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.title + '

Priority: ' + $('Extract Ticket Data').item.json.priority + ' | View in Zammad

', message_type: 'comment', subtype_xmlid: 'mail.mt_note' } ] }, id: 4 }) }}
